title: Gemini's personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
abstract: Gemini's personalized AI image generation is now free for US users! Yes, you heard it right—the tool that turns your ideas into pictures on the spot. Now you can unleash your creativity without breaking the bank. Give it a try and get ready for some delightful surprises! 🎉
abstract_zh: Gemini 的个性化AI 图像生成现在免费啦！对，你没听错，就是那个能让你的想法瞬间变成画中人的家伙。这下子，你可以尽情发挥创意，不用心疼钱了！快来试试吧，保证给你满满的惊喜和乐趣！🎉
